message:
style: reorder imports alphabetically across buffer service and test modules

Applies consistent alphabetical ordering to `use` statements in
src/service/buffer.rs, tests/common/mod.rs, and tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs,
bringing them in line with the Rust import convention (SCREAMING_SNAKE constants
first, then PascalCase types, then snake_case functions). No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
